name: Brick Breaker
short_description: A game about destroying bricks and stop them from spreading. Unlock balls with unique attacks that help you get further and defeat all 14 bosses. Build up a base, gather resources and use them to improve your stats. Dont let the bricks touch you!
detailed_description:
A game about destroying bricks and stop them from spreading. Unlock balls with unique attacks that help you get further and defeat all 14 bosses. Build up a base, gather resources and use them to improve your stats. Your goal is to defeat all 14 bosses. But the bricks are there to hurt and kill you if they spread and get too close to your base!

+10 unique balls with 3 different upgrades each
+14 different bosses with unique deadly attacks
+Equip your base with lasers, farms, mines and other upgrades
+Tutorial that help you get started
+Steam achivements
+Highscore and top list
+Over 240 different maps
